response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified "Shiny Smily Story" from on-screen text in the final scene.
2. Searched for `"Shiny Smily Story" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics` to retrieve both original language and English lyrics.
3. Mapped the video structure into a non-vocal driving portion and a vocal performance portion.
response.global_summary: The video features 3D character Cecilia Immergreen in a variety of short car-driving segments, followed by a sequence in a clockwork-themed environment where she engages in dialogue, and finally, a musical performance of "Shiny Smily Story" by Cecilia and other Hololive members.

scenes.description: Cecilia Immergreen driving a car through various 3D environments.
Cecilia Immergreen and other Hololive members perform "Shiny Smily Story" in a clockwork-themed environment.
scenes.performer_in_video: Cecilia Immergreen, Mori Calliope, and others (Hololive)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
同じ未来を見ていたい
あの夢手にしたい
それぞれ 違った
ココロで 走れ GO

どこを見ても真っ暗な
場所に芽生えてた
ほんの小さな希望に
この瞳奪われた
不安で揺れる心を
上手くチューニングして
ほんの小さな勇気を
振り絞っていたよ

諦めの文字
デリートして進む
苦しいときも
もう私は ひとりじゃないから

だからもっと夢追いかけたい
ワクワク止まらない
想像 越えてく
世界見せてあげる
アクセスしてみたい？
後悔なんてそうさせない
それぞれ 違った
ココロで 走れ GO

仮想の空に輝く
眩しい想いは
見たことのない光を
現実に届けるよ
いつも聞こえるエールは
ここにキャプチャーして
また新しい光を
探したくなるよ
君の笑顔は
保存して進む
悲しいときに
見返すよ
力が湧く
(それぞれ 違った)
(ココロで 走れ GO)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to keep watching the same future
I want to get that dream in my hands
With our own different hearts
Let's run, GO

No matter where I looked, it was pitch black
But a tiny hope sprouted
And my eyes were stolen by it
I tuned my heart that was shaking with anxiety
And squeezed out a little bit of courage

I delete the words "give up" and move forward
Even when it's hard, I'm not alone anymore

So I want to chase my dreams even more
The excitement won't stop
I'll show you a world that goes beyond your imagination
Do you want to try accessing it?
I won't let you regret it
With our own different hearts
Let's run, GO

Shining in the virtual sky, these dazzling feelings
Will deliver a light you've never seen before
To reality
I'll capture the cheers I always hear, right here
And I'll want to search for new light again
I'll save your smile and move forward
When I'm sad, I'll look back at it
And it will give me strength
(With our own different hearts)
(Let's run, GO)
